mapper.update: UPDATE medir_staff SET team_id = #{teamId}, name = #{name}, employee_no = #{employeeNo}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, member_type = #{memberType}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, fixed_post_id = #{fixedPostId}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE medir_staff SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
